title: Business Development / Student Enrollment Manager (International School)
description:
Business Development / Student Enrollment Manager (International School)

Location: Woodleigh

Working hours: 8am – 5pm / Fully on-site

The Student Enrollment Manager serves as a key brand ambassador for the school, with a strong understanding of the school’s value proposition and the ability to address the diverse needs of prospective parents and students. The role is focused on delivering a personalised admissions experience that builds trust, supports informed decision-making, and drives successful enrolment outcomes.

Key objectives include:

·       Developing a deep understanding of individual parent and student needs and tailoring the admissions approach to provide a personalised and consultative experience.

·       Promoting the school effectively to prospective families by clearly articulating its values, programmes, and community

·       Qualifying and converting enquiries into applications and confirmed enrolments.

·       Supporting students and families from various enquiry channels throughout the admissions and application process.

·       Actively supporting student recruitment initiatives, outreach activities, and admissions-related events.

Requirements

·       Degree level qualification in related field

·       At least 3 years of sales or customer service experience in an B2C environment

Please submit your updated resume in Word format by using the Apply Now Button.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Email resume to Sherry.Yeoh@peopleprofilers.com

People Profilers Pte Ltd, 20 Cecil Street, #08-09, PLUS Building, Singapore 049705.

Tel: 6950 9741

http://www.peopleprofilers.com

EA License Number: 02C4944

Ref: RYV6475R

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
